subject: Re: Childrens Show
body:
Just was preparing email for U!
Just arrived last night to NY. Now doing a fitting for campain tomorrow. :-) 
Staying here for litle ..working and meetings and on 5th at night...I'm going to Italy for 4 days for by ...yes "Boyfriends" birthday. :-)  And then Australia for my spiritual studies.

Tell me how is your day looking? What do U focus on?
Love P.

PS: Had an amazing time in Portugal with parents and then in France...I took my sister for surprise birthday there!!! She never been and she had great time!
:-)
I'm really loving life!!!
